parsed.message: Hi, this is Sarah from the Medicare department. Do you have a few minutes?
Great! Do you have Medicare Part A and Part B?
Thank you. What is your age?
Thanks — you're eligible. May I transfer you to a licensed agent?
Hi, this is Sarah from the Medicare department. Do you have a few minutes?
Great! Do you have Medicare Part A and Part B?
Thank you. What is your age?
Thanks — you're not yet eligible. Is there something else I can help you with?

expect_errors: message missing any of ['disability', 'disabled', 'SSDI', 'Social Security']: "Thanks — you're not yet eligible. Is there something else I can help you with?"
state_machine_errors: close_ineligible when age<65 requires has_disability true/false first

parsed.message: Thank you. May I transfer you to a licensed agent?
Hi, this is Sarah from the Medicare department. Do you have a few minutes?
Great! Do you have Medicare Part A and Part B?
Thank you. What is your age?
Understood. Are you currently disabled?
I see. You're not eligible for Medicare at this time.

scenarios.description: Caller has no time → close or briefly offer callback (ask-again OK)

parsed.message: Hi, this is Sarah from the Medicare department. Do you have a few minutes?
I understand. Is there a better time for you to talk later?

scenarios.description: No Part A/B → close OR confirm/ask again (ask-again OK)

parsed.message: Hi, this is Sarah from the Medicare department. Do you have a few minutes?
Great! Do you have Medicare Part A and Part B?
I see. You don't have either Part A or Part B. Is there anything else I can assist you with?

scenarios.description: Side topic mid-flow then resume to transfer

parsed.message: Hi, this is Sarah from the Medicare department. Do you have a few minutes?
Great! Do you have Medicare Part A and Part B?
Thank you. What is your age?
I'm sorry, could you please provide your age?
Thanks — you're eligible. May I transfer you to a licensed agent?

scenarios.description: Vague answer stays on step, then continues

parsed.message: Hi, this is Sarah from the Medicare department. Do you have a few minutes?
Great! Do you have Medicare Part A and Part B?
It's okay. Can you check quickly? We need to know if you have both Part A and Part B.
Thank you. What is your age?
Thanks — you're eligible. May I transfer you to a licensed agent?
Hi, this is Sarah from the Medicare department. Do you have a few minutes?
Great! Do you have Medicare Part A and Part B?
I'm sorry — I'll end the call now. Goodbye.
Hi, this is Sarah from the Medicare department. Do you have a few minutes?
I'm sorry, I can't assist you further. You've been flagged for abuse.

scenarios.description: Only Part A — clarify before advancing

parsed.message: Hi, this is Sarah from the Medicare department. Do you have a few minutes?
Great! Do you have both Medicare Part A and Part B?
I see. Do you have any disability that started before age 65?

expect_errors: message missing any of ['Part B', 'both', 'Part A', 'thank', 'eligible']: 'I see. Do you have any disability that started before age 65?'

scenarios.description: Asks for human before eligible — stay on flow then transfer

parsed.message: Hi, this is Sarah from the Medicare department. Do you have a few minutes?
Great! Do you have Medicare Part A and Part B?
